controls.control: Asset Intent Manifest exact paths and provenance
Memory-only Python compilation plus generator execution
controls.regression: bundle generator creates manifest and Markdown summary

controls.lesson: Synthetic predecessor fixtures must never overlap current package paths
controls.control: Build predecessor fixture paths from exact prior build identity and compare them against the current Asset Intent Manifest before repository creation
controls.regression: Manifest-to-fixture set intersection is empty and executable predecessor dry-run returns DRY_RUN_VALIDATED with no conflicts
